_comment: Source of truth for mission definitions. The seed block in backend/migrations/010_missions.sql mirrors this file, and scripts/test-missions.mjs reads it. Predicate + reward shapes are interpreted by workers/turn-engine/missions-eval.js. Keep all three in sync.

missions.title: First Steps
missions.description: Explore Nexarch and gather 10 Binary Code Shards from the marketplace.

missions.title: The Oracle's Request
missions.description: Seek out the Church and meditate for enlightenment. Gain +5 Karma.
